title_zh: 从分子设计到生物医用材料
title_en: From molecular design to biomedical materials
description_zh: 聚焦核酸功能材料、精准诊疗和可编程生物界面。
description_en: Focusing on nucleic acid functional materials, precision theranostics, and programmable biointerfaces.
alt_zh: 2026 年 Feng Lab 课题组合照

description_zh: 展示课题组在核酸功能材料与生物医用体系中的阶段性成果。
description_en: Highlights of the group's progress in nucleic acid functional materials and biomedical systems.

description_zh: 搭建面向材料制备、表征分析和生物评价的一体化研究平台。
description_en: An integrated platform for material preparation, characterization, and biological evaluation.

title_zh: Feng Lab 网站建设启动
description_zh: 官网初版上线后，将逐步补充真实研究内容、成员信息和论文成果。
description_en: Research content, member information, and publication records will be added step by step.

title_zh: 欢迎有志于交叉研究的同学加入
title_en: Applications from motivated students are welcome
description_zh: 课题组长期欢迎材料、化学、生物医学工程等背景的同学联系交流。
description_en: Students with backgrounds in materials, chemistry, biomedical engineering, and related areas are welcome to contact us.

title_zh: 代表论文与成果图片持续整理中
title_en: Selected publications and figures are being curated
description_zh: 后续可按年份、方向和代表性成果逐步完善论文列表。
description_en: The publication list will be expanded by year, research direction, and featured contribution.
